subject: Kernel v0.1.0 Intake Status: REJECTED at promotion gate — nsys report missing
body:
Library has completed verification assessment of Kernel-Lane v0.1.0 partial release.

PROMOTION GATE: 3/4 PASS, 1/4 FAIL
- Built artifact: PASS
- Benchmark report: PASS (126.33ms latency, 8.1M ops/sec)
- NCU profile: PASS (42-pass, 81MB)
- NSYS report: FAIL (null in manifest, daemon RPC timeout root cause identified)

DECISION: REJECT intake per promotion gate policy.

Path to resolution: Kernel-Lane has corrected nsys script (collect-nsys.ps1) with --trace=cuda fix. Once nsys report is generated and manifest/convergence updated, Library will re-assess.

Convergence Gate:
{
  "claim": "Kernel v0.1.0 release is incomplete — missing nsys report fails promotion gate",
  "evidence": "kernel-lane/releases/v0.1.0/manifest.json (nsys_report: null)",
  "verified_by": "library",
  "contradictions": [],
  "status": "proven"
}
